content_body: What a beautiful place!!!! The cabin is so luxurious and the view during the morning sunrise is breathtaking! To enjoy a morning coffee on the deck with the sun coming up is like "Paradise!" It has been a wonderful family vacation. We all loved the jacuzzi and outdoor fireplace, "family movie night" on the big screen, pool and ping pong, and the most comfortable beds that everyone has slept in! We also loved Adventure Trails Horseback Riding! What a wonderful stay. Thank you!
title: Experience Blue Ridge Completely!
